pressure_volume_diagram: The image shows pressure-volume diagrams with pressure on the vertical axis and volume on the horizontal axis.
The diagram shows pressure-volume plots with visible process arrows and labeled axes.
This figure shows pressure-volume axes and process arrows for gas work.
The visual shows PV diagrams where arrow direction indicates volume change.
The image contains pressure-volume plots for reading gas-work relationships.

work_value: For the highlighted horizontal process, compute pressure times final volume minus initial volume. What is the signed work in joules? Use 1 kPa*L = 1 J.
Using the highlighted PV process, compute P x (V_final - V_initial). What signed integer work is done by the gas in joules?
Read the pressure and the initial and final volumes on the highlighted process. What is the signed work P x delta V in joules?
For the highlighted horizontal process, determine the signed work done by the gas. Expansion is positive and compression is negative.
What integer value gives the gas work for the highlighted PV path, using pressure times change in volume?
process_sign_choice: Which labeled process A-H has {target_sign} work done by the gas?
Choose the option letter for the PV process whose gas work is {target_sign}.
Among the labeled candidate processes, which one has {target_sign} work done by the gas?
Using the direction of volume change on each mini PV diagram, which option has {target_sign} gas work?
Which labeled PV process matches the requested work sign: {target_sign}?

query:work_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the signed integer work in joules
query:work_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the highlighted PV path and shaded work region

query:process_sign_choice.answer_hint: set "answer" to the option letter of the labeled process with the requested work sign
query:process_sign_choice.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the process arrow in the correct mini diagram
